hooks.command: cd /Users/youngmikim/Projects/onstep && if git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet && [ -z "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ]; then exit 0; fi && git add . && git commit -m "auto: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push && cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && firebase deploy --only hosting 2>&1
